commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer label and sandbox egress semantics require maintainer acceptance; there is no narrow automation repair indicated from this review.; Needs attention: The patch has no supply-chain concern, but it intentionally changes sandbox network egress semantics and needs maintainer acceptance. (sha=48fc8366ce65c0a126ed045194ea613d68e1fe69)
commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces the Codex app-server sandbox clamp with an explicit per-turn workspace-write policy whose `networkAccess` mirrors active OpenClaw sandbox egress, and updates focused tests, docs, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main clamps active OpenClaw sandboxed Codex turns to `workspace-write`, and the current workspace-write policy hardcodes `networkAccess: false`. I did not run a live DNS or GWS reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Protected `maintainer` label and sandbox egress semantics require maintainer acceptance; there is no narrow automation repair indicated from this review.

target.title: fix(codex): preserve sandbox egress for app-server turns
target.body:
Summary:
- Keep Codex native code-mode turns on Codex workspace-write when an OpenClaw sandbox is active, but derive the turn networkAccess flag from OpenClaw sandbox egress.
- Preserve offline Docker sandbox default network: "none" while allowing outbound access for network: "bridge" or custom Docker networks.
- Update Codex harness and sandbox docs plus changelog for #83347.

Verification:
- pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts
- pnpm format:docs:check
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts
- git diff --check
- codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --uncommitted

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: sandboxed Codex app-server turns no longer lose network when the OpenClaw sandbox egress config allows outbound access.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on macOS with focused Vitest coverage for Codex app-server turn policy.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts
Evidence after fix: terminal output: 2 test files passed, 195 tests passed; autoreview reported no actionable correctness issues.
Observed result after fix: active OpenClaw Docker sandbox network none maps to Codex workspaceWrite networkAccess false; Docker bridge/custom and non-Docker sandbox backends map to networkAccess true while preserving Codex filesystem sandboxing.
What was not tested: live DNS/GWS network request from a packaged sandboxed Codex agent.

Fixes #83347.
target.author: steipete
